source.name: Path filters have no effect for Go

markdownMessage: Go does not support path-based filtering. The `paths` and `paths-ignore` configuration properties will have no effect for this language. If desired, you can use the [advanced-security/filter-sarif Action](https://github.com/advanced-security/filter-sarif) to rewrite the SARIF file to exclude alerts from these paths.
plaintextMessage: Go does not support path-based filtering. The "paths" and "paths-ignore" configuration properties will have no effect for this language. If desired, you can use the advanced-security/filter-sarif Action to rewrite the SARIF file to exclude alerts from these paths. For more information, see https://github.com/advanced-security/filter-sarif
